requisitoLingua.citazione: All subjects from our study offer for exchange students are advanced-level courses taught entirely in English; students must demonstrate English skills at the B2 level.

scadenzeOspitante.citazione: Nomination by Home Coordinator: 14 May / 14 October. Deadline for the duly signed student's Application Form and Online Learning Agreement: 31 May / 31 October.

linkCatalogo.citazione: Study offer; Subjects winter semester 2026/27; Subjects summer semester 2026/27.

notaDisponibilita.citazione: student chooses the subjects from the level of studies for which he/she will come
